productDisplayName: Scholl Men Massagio Black Formal Shoes
description: Crafted from the finest leather, this Massagio oxford from scholl is designed to offer comfort at its best, without compromising on style. Packed with features that offer luxurious comfort, this pair makes you look your executive best when paired with formals and classy accessories.Upper Full grain leather upper Mildly padded collar with a fabric inner liningLacing system for a snug, customised FitPadded footbed with arch support and ribs for a massage feel, has a shock-dot centre for shock absorption and a contoured heel cupRemovable footbed to accommodate an orthoticMidsoleEVA midsole for impact protectionOutsole TPR outsole with textured lugs and grooves on the forefoot and heel for enhanced grip and tractionshoe careWipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dustUse a branded leather conditioner if neededDo not store in direct sunlight
